pi_items.source: Hardcoded in setup_task.sh line 23: CASE_TITLE="Privacy Compliance Review - Ticket #8842". This exact value is also present in task.json metadata (line 17) and task description (line 5).

Defined in task.json metadata (line 18). Task instructions (line 5 of task.json) require replacing phone number with exact text '[REDACTED]'. Verified in verifier.py (line 63) which checks for presence of '[REDACTED]' marker. Also checked in export_result.sh (line 64) with grep for '[REDACTED]'.

pi_items.verified_value: 202-555-0xx where xx is randomly generated between 100-199
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 13-14: RANDOM_SUFFIX=$(shuf -i 100-199 -n 1) and PHONE_NUMBER="202-555-0${RANDOM_SUFFIX}". The 555 exchange is officially reserved for fictional/fictional use in North America (verified via web search of NANPA documentation).

privileged_info_summary: The task is to sanitize a case description by replacing a randomly-generated fictional phone number (format 202-555-0xx) with the redaction marker '[REDACTED]' in a case titled 'Privacy Compliance Review - Ticket #8842'. The case and phone number are created synthetically during task setup. The case title is a fictional reference (Ticket #8842), and the phone number uses the 555 exchange, which is officially reserved by NANPA for fictional use in North America (555-0100 through 555-0199). All data is synthetic and not based on real datasets.
